subject: Unable to complete payment for Pro plan

thread.text: I've tried 3 times and my payment keeps failing. I need the Pro plan for my business. This is urgent.
Ticket created. Priority set to HIGH by rules engine.

Sorry to hear your payment didn't go through. Here are some common fixes:
1. Double-check your card number, expiry date, and CVV
2. Ensure your billing address matches your bank records
3. Check with your bank — some block online transactions by default
4. Try a different payment method or card
5. Clear your browser cache and retry
If the issue persists, please share the last 4 digits of your card and we'll investigate further.

subject: Export CSV button does nothing on Firefox

thread.text: When I click "Export CSV" in Firefox 120 on Windows 11, nothing happens. Works fine on Chrome.
Thank you for the detailed report! I've reproduced this and filed it with engineering. Fix is targeted for next week's release.

To reset your password, please follow these steps:
1. Visit the login page and click "Forgot Password"
2. Enter your registered email address
3. Check your inbox for a reset link (check spam if not received)
4. Click the link and follow the instructions to set a new password
5. The link expires after 24 hours — request a new one if needed.
Let us know if you run into any issues!
